ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the employee works for */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "basic_salary" REAL /* Basic monthly salary of the employee */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Performance rating ID of the employee */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the employee record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance rating */,
  "rating_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance rating */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance rating */,
  "bonus_percentage" REAL /* Bonus percentage associated with the performance rating */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rating record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who acquired the loan */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "monthly_installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the loan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the loan */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the loan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan payment */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan being paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bonuses" (
  "bonus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bonus award */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the bonus */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Performance rating ID for the bonus award */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Amount of the bonus awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the bonus was awarded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bonus record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the bonus record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bonus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bonuses_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary calculation */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee for whom the salary is calculated */,
  "gross_salary" REAL /* Gross salary before deductions */,
  "loan_deduction" REAL /* Total loan deductions */,
  "bonus_amount" REAL /* Bonus amount included in the salary */,
  "net_salary" REAL /* Net salary after deductions and bonus */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date the salary calculation was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary calculation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salary calculation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_calculations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* User who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit trail record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
